item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux

tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)

chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)

Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)

WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]

[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]

item.content:encoded:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
MMS support
MPRIS
removable device detection (via UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC, WavPack and Monkey's Audio)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
sending listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm and ListenBrainz
CDDB support
audio converter
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner
archive reader (RAR and 7z)
audio recording
listening history
media library

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

item.title: Quimup [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Quimup [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: coon
item.itunes:summary:
Quimup
(Audioplayers)
QUIMUP is a client for the music player daemon (MPD) written in C++ and QT6.
[read more]
item.description:
Quimup
(Audioplayers)
QUIMUP is a client for the music player daemon (MPD) written in C++ and QT6.
[read more]

item.title: Kpl 6.0 [Science]
item.itunes:title: Kpl 6.0 [Science]
item.itunes:author: stille
item.itunes:summary:
Kpl 6.0
(Science)
Kpl is a program for two- and three-dimensional graphical presentation of data sets and functions. Multidimensional nonlinear parameter fits of functions to data sets can be performed using the Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm. Also general linear least square parameter fits are possible. A D-Bus interface can be used to control Kpl by other applications and scripts.

[read more]
item.description:
Kpl 6.0
(Science)
Kpl is a program for two- and three-dimensional graphical presentation of data sets and functions. Multidimensional nonlinear parameter fits of functions to data sets can be performed using the Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm. Also general linear least square parameter fits are possible. A D-Bus interface can be used to control Kpl by other applications and scripts.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Kpl 6.0
(Science)
Kpl is a program for two- and three-dimensional graphical presentation of data sets and functions. Multidimensional nonlinear parameter fits of functions to data sets can be performed using the Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm. Also general linear least square parameter fits are possible. A D-Bus interface can be used to control Kpl by other applications and scripts.

[read more]

item.title: Stealthcavern [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Stealthcavern [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: cachecontrol
item.itunes:summary:
Stealthcavern
(Various Games)
Stealthcavern (Free Libre Action Roleplaying Engine) is a simple game engine
built to handle a very specific kind of game: multi-player 2D action RPGs.
It is a tribute to and exploration of the action RPG genre.
[read more]
item.description:
Stealthcavern
(Various Games)
Stealthcavern (Free Libre Action Roleplaying Engine) is a simple game engine
built to handle a very specific kind of game: multi-player 2D action RPGs.
It is a tribute to and exploration of the action RPG genre.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Stealthcavern
(Various Games)
Stealthcavern (Free Libre Action Roleplaying Engine) is a simple game engine
built to handle a very specific kind of game: multi-player 2D action RPGs.
It is a tribute to and exploration of the action RPG genre.
[read more]

item.title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:author: vlyskouski
item.itunes:summary:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Recurring Payments
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Export to XLSX (Excel)
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.description:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Recurring Payments
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Export to XLSX (Excel)
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Recurring Payments
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Export to XLSX (Excel)
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]

item.title: ShowImage [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: ShowImage [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: mkoller
item.itunes:summary:
ShowImage
(Graphic Apps)
ShowImage is a simple KDE based image viewer using the maximum space inside its window without cluttering the window with menubar, toolbar or statusbar.
It is my replacement for the KDE3 tool kuickshow.
You simply act via the keyboard (rotate, zoom, etc.) or via the context menu (right mouse click).
You can view a single image or browse through a full directory, optionally in fullscreen mode.
[read more]
item.description:
ShowImage
(Graphic Apps)
ShowImage is a simple KDE based image viewer using the maximum space inside its window without cluttering the window with menubar, toolbar or statusbar.
It is my replacement for the KDE3 tool kuickshow.
You simply act via the keyboard (rotate, zoom, etc.) or via the context menu (right mouse click).
You can view a single image or browse through a full directory, optionally in fullscreen mode.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ShowImage
(Graphic Apps)
ShowImage is a simple KDE based image viewer using the maximum space inside its window without cluttering the window with menubar, toolbar or statusbar.
It is my replacement for the KDE3 tool kuickshow.
You simply act via the keyboard (rotate, zoom, etc.) or via the context menu (right mouse click).
You can view a single image or browse through a full directory, optionally in fullscreen mode.
[read more]
